relics.name: Buried Treasure
relics.description: Whenever you gain Gold, gain 50% more. Whenever you heal, heal 50% more. Upon pickup, gain 100 Gold and heal 10 HP.

relics.name: Flood Gain
relics.description: The first time each turn you deal at least 10 Attack damage in a single hit, gain [E].

relics.name: High Surf
relics.description: At the start of each combat, gain 1 Dexterity. Whenever you play a Skill, gain 1 Dexterity this turn.
relics.flavorText: "Flow forth, my niece, and overwhelm all those who stand against us, would you there?"

relics.name: Hydraulic Might
relics.description: Your Attacks deal double damage on the first 2 turns of combat.
relics.flavorText: "My waves can slam into the land with massive force, especially when I give them a little push!"

relics.name: King Tide
relics.description: At the start of each Normal/Elite/Boss combat, gain 1/3/5 Strength.
relics.flavorText: "A storm is brewing, Niece. Big one, this time, why, even bigger than the last! Prepare!"

relics.name: Razor Shoals
relics.description: Choose 3 Attacks in your Deck. Enchant them with Splash 5.
relics.flavorText: "Even the mortals know the sea is bountiful, yet also capable of deadly force!"

relics.name: Sea Star
relics.description: Whenever you take a combat reward, there is a 30% chance for another reward of the same type to appear. Rewards created this way can also trigger this effect.
relics.flavorText: "The untold bounties of the sea are yours! Well, one of them, at least!"

relics.name: Second Wave
relics.description: Every 2nd turn, gain [E] and draw 1 additional card.
relics.flavorText: "High tide has come again, my niece! Which is my little way of saying, here we go!"

relics.name: Slippery Slope
relics.description: Your Attacks apply 1 Froth on every hit.
relics.flavorText: "You are swimming in dangerous waters with such antics, Niece."

relics.name: Water Fitness
relics.description: Upon pickup, gain 2 Max HP for each relic you have, including this one. Whenever you obtain a relic, gain 2 Max HP.
relics.flavorText: "Your injuries shall make you stronger, Niece!"

relics.name: Wave Flourish
relics.description: The first time each turn you draw 2 cards during your turn, gain [E].

relics.name: Wave Strike
relics.description: The 3rd Attack played each turn is played an additional time.

enchantments.name: Splash
enchantments.description: Apply N Rupture on every hit.

keywords.name: Froth
keywords.description: Whenever this creature obtains 3 stacks, it takes 10 damage and loses 2 Strength this turn.

keywords.name: High Surf
keywords.description: Gain Dexterity until the end of this turn.

keywords.name: Rupture
keywords.description: Ruptured creatures take damage at the start of their turn.

keywords.name: Slippery Slope
keywords.description: Lose Strength until the end of this turn.

mods.name: Poseidon Ancient
mods.description: This mod adds Poseidon from the hit game Hades 2 as a new Ancient.
